displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: The Freedon Nadd Uprising
synopsis: Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - The Freedon Nadd Uprising is a story arc of the Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi comic book series. It ran from August 1, 1994 to September 1, 1994. HighBridge Audio released a Tales of the Jedi audio drama of the comic.
title: Tales of the Jedi: The Freedon Nadd Uprising
